listings.title: Modern Ceramic Planter
listings.description:
Perfect for ferns, pothos, succulents, herbs, or any small houseplant, this planter works beautifully in minimalist, earthy, or boho-inspired spaces. It also makes a thoughtful gift for plant lovers, new homeowners, or anyone who appreciates handmade pottery.

Dimensions: 
Height: 3 in
Width: 4 in

listings.title: Handmade Persian Haft Seen Set | Minimal Ceramic Nowruz Tableware | Modern white Haftsin Sets
listings.description:
A set of five plates/bowl made for the Nowruz haft seen table. Each piece is wheel-thrown and finished in a white glaze -  simple, earthy, and made to hold the symbols of the new year.

Designed to honor tradition while fitting seamlessly into contemporary homes, these pieces are perfect for displaying the seven symbolic items of Haft-Seen during Nowruz, and can be enjoyed year-round as serving bowls or decorative dishes.

Each piece is carefully handmade, making every set subtly unique.
Details
• Handmade stoneware ceramics
• Glazed interior is food safe
• Exterior features raw clay texture for a natural, earthy contrast
• Neutral glaze complements any table setting
• Minimal, modern aesthetic with Persian cultural roots
• Each set is one of a kind

Set Includes
• Matching 4 plates and 1 bowl 
• Coordinated forms designed specifically for a Haft-Seen table
• Listing is for one complete Haft-Seen set (as shown)

Dimensions: 
Plates: approx. 1in x 5in (H x W)
Bowl: approx. 1.5in x 3.5in (H x W)

listings.title: Handmade Wavy Ceramic Jewelry Tray – Organic Sculptural Trinket Dish/catchall
listings.description:
These handmade ceramic tray are sculpted into a soft, wavy form that’s perfect for holding jewelry, keys, or little daily treasures. The glossy white glaze pools beautifully in the curves, while the raw clay edges add warmth and an organic, modern feel.

Each piece is one of a kind — shaped by hand, with natural variations that make every tray unique. Use it on your nightstand for rings and earrings, on a vanity for bracelets and chains, or by the entryway as a stylish catchall.

A simple, elegant accent that elevates any space and makes a thoughtful gift for jewelry lovers, minimalists, or anyone who appreciates handmade pottery.

Dimensions: approx. 2.25 x 7 x 6 (H x W x D)

Care: Food-safe, microwave-safe, and dishwasher-safe, though hand-washing is recommended to preserve the glaze.

listings.title: Handmade Stoneware Bowl | Rustic Glazed Ceramic Pet Bowl
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic bowl features a warm, natural stoneware body and a soft, speckled interior glaze. Wheel-thrown and finished by hand.

Its durable weight and smooth, food-safe glaze make it versatile for everyday dining or as a stylish ceramic pet bowl for dogs or cats. Whether used for soup, snacks, or pet food and water, this bowl is designed to be both functional and beautiful.

The contrast between the raw clay exterior and glazed interior gives it a grounded, modern feel that fits effortlessly into minimalist homes- human or pet-friendly alike.

Each bowl is one of a kind, with natural variations in glaze flow and form that reflect the handmade process.

Dimensions: 
• Approx. 5.75” diameter 2.5” height

Care Instructions:
• Dishwasher safe (hand washing recommended for longevity)
• Microwave safe

listings.title: Handmade Ceramic Cup with Pomegranate Motif | Minimalist Porcelain Tumbler | Tea & Coffee Cup
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic cup features a bold, hand-painted pomegranate design on a soft, creamy glaze. Each pomegranate is painted individually, giving the cup a warm, organic feel that celebrates simple forms and traditional symbolism.

Perfect for coffee, tea, or your favorite warm drink, this cup is wheel-thrown and glazed by hand, making every piece one of a kind. The slightly rounded shape fits comfortably in your hands and feels just right for slow mornings or cozy evenings.

Perfect for espresso, tea, coffee, or as a small everyday tumbler, this cup brings a quiet, minimalistic presence to your daily ritual.

Details:
• Handmade Porcelain ceramic cup
• hand painted pomegranate design
• Food-safe, high-fired ceramic
• Ideal for espresso, tea, or small coffee

Dimensions: approx. 3.25in x 3 in (H x W)

Care: Food-safe, microwave-safe, and dishwasher-safe, though hand-washing is recommended to preserve the glaze.

listings.title: Handmade Ceramic Tumbler| Minimal Stoneware Cup with Raw Clay | Espresso, Tea, or Coffee
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic cup is crafted from stoneware clay and designed with a calm, minimalist aesthetic. The exterior features warm, natural raw clay with subtle hand-carved line details, while the rim is finished with a soft white glaze for a smooth, comfortable drinking surface.

Each cup is wheel-thrown and finished by hand, making every piece truly one of a kind. Slight variations in shape, texture, and glaze are part of the beauty of handmade pottery and ensure your cup is uniquely yours.

Perfect for espresso, tea, coffee, or as a small everyday tumbler, this cup brings a quiet, earthy presence to your daily ritual.

Details:
• Handmade stoneware ceramic cup
• Raw clay exterior with carved line accents
• Glazed rim and interior for functionality
• Food-safe, high-fired ceramic
• Ideal for espresso, tea, or small coffee

Dimensions: approx. 2.75 in x 3.25 in (H x W)

Care: Food-safe, microwave-safe, and dishwasher-safe, though hand-washing is recommended to preserve the glaze.

listings.description:
This handmade espresso Mug features a beautiful blue textured crystalline glaze that gives the surface a soft, organic, icy pattern. Wheel-thrown from stoneware clay, each cup has its own subtle variations, making it truly one-of-a-kind.

The rounded form fits comfortably in your hand, perfect for espresso shots, tea sips, or small daily rituals. The glossy interior and textured exterior add contrast and charm, giving this piece a calming, artisanal feel.

Dimensions: approx. 3.50 in x 3.25 in (H x W)

listings.title: Green Geometric Planter - Speckled Clay Indoor Planter
listings.description:
Bring a touch of handmade charm to your home with this ceramic planter, crafted from stoneware clay and finished with a mix of raw texture and smooth glaze. The inside is half glazed for easy cleaning, while the exterior features a beautiful balance of exposed clay and soft glaze accents — giving it an earthy, modern aesthetic.

Perfect Planter for succulents or any medium sized houseplant, this planter works beautifully in minimalist, earthy, or boho-inspired spaces. It also makes a thoughtful gift for plant lovers, new homeowners, or anyone who appreciates handmade pottery.

Dimensions:  approx 4.25 in x 5.75 in ( H x W )
Care: Food-safe, microwave-safe, and dishwasher-safe, though hand-washing is recommended to preserve the glaze.

listings.title: Ikebana Kenzan Bowl – Wheel-Thrown Ceramic Floral Arrangement
listings.description:
This piece is ideal for displaying single blooms, seasonal branches, or small curated arrangements. A beautiful addition to coffee tables, shelves, kitchen Islands, or a thoughtful gift for flower lovers.

Bowl comes with a 1.34-inch brass kenzan (frog pin), making it effortless to create balanced, sculptural ikebana flower arrangements. Just add water, place your stems on the frog pin, and let your creativity flow.

Details:
Dimensions: approx 2.75inch x 3.25inch (H x W)
Handmade, wheel-thrown stoneware
Includes 1.34" brass frog pin (kenzan)
Food-safe glaze (if needed for multi-use)
Perfect for ikebana, floral art, or minimalist décor

listings.title: Handmade Stoneware Espresso Cup
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic cup is wheel-thrown using a smooth stoneware clay and soda fired. 
this cup was fired in a soda kiln, giving the surface its signature variation, subtle texture, and organic movement. The white crackle base blends beautifully with a flowing glaze design in deep red, teal, and earthy green tones, each drip and swirl created naturally during the firing process.

Perfect as an espresso cup, small tea cup, or a cozy little vessel for matcha, cortados, or warm sips throughout the day. Each piece is unique, with natural variations that show the handmade process.

Includes 1.34" brass frog pin (kenzan)

listings.title: Handmade Ikebana Arrangement Bowl – Stoneware Flower Display Dish
listings.description:
This piece is ideal for displaying single blooms, seasonal branches, or small curated arrangements. A beautiful addition to coffee tables, shelves, kitchen Islands, or a thoughtful gift for flower lovers.

Bowl comes with a 1.34-inch brass kenzan (frog pin), making it effortless to create balanced, sculptural ikebana compositions. Just add water, place your stems on the frog pin, and let your creativity flow.

listings.title: Handmade Wavy White Ceramic Jewelry Tray – Organic Sculptural Trinket Dish/catchall
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic tray is sculpted into a soft, wavy form that’s perfect for holding jewelry, keys, or little daily treasures. The glossy white glaze pools beautifully in the curves, while the raw clay edges add warmth and an organic, modern feel.

Each piece is one of a kind — shaped by hand, with natural variations that make every tray unique. Use it on your nightstand for rings and earrings, on a vanity for bracelets and chains, or by the entryway as a stylish catchall.

A simple, elegant accent that elevates any space and makes a thoughtful gift for jewelry lovers, minimalists, or anyone who appreciates handmade pottery.

listings.title: Black Lava Ceramic Pot • Wheel-Thrown Stoneware Planter • Modern Minimalist Plant Pot
listings.description:
This planter blends minimalist form with high-contrast texture, making it a standout piece for ferns, succulents, or any plant that deserves a unique home. The raw exterior meets a smooth interior, creating a functional yet artful design that works beautifully in modern and earthy home

Dimensions: approx. 3.25 in x 4.5 in (H x W)
Care: Hand wash only for longer lasting planter.

listings.title: Ceramic Espresso Cup • Small Handmade Tea Cup • Modern Boho Stoneware Pottery
listings.description:
Enjoy your favorite espresso or tea in this handmade soda-fired ceramic cup, crafted from speckled stoneware and wheel-thrown with a smooth, minimalist shape. The soda firing process creates rich, organic surface variations and subtle sheen, making each cup completely one-of-a-kind.

Dimensions: approx. 2.75 in x 2.75 in (H x W)
Care: Food safe, microwave safe, and handwashing is recommended to preserve the finish.

A beautiful everyday cup or a thoughtful handmade gift for coffee and tea lovers.

listings.title: Handmade Ceramic Espresso Cup – Minimalist Pink & White Stoneware Cup
listings.description:
This handmade ceramic cup is wheel-thrown using a smooth stoneware clay and finished with a soft pink-to-white gradient glaze. The subtle crackle texture and natural clay tones give it a warm, minimalist look that fits beautifully in any kitchen or coffee ritual.

Perfect as an espresso cup, small tea cup, or a cozy little vessel for matcha, cortados, or warm sips throughout the day. Each piece is unique, with natural variations that show the handmade process.

Dimensions: approx. 2.5 in x 3 in (H x W)

Care: Food-safe, microwave-safe, and dishwasher-safe, though hand-washing is recommended to preserve the glaze.
